user_description.ru: Он пишет на твоём теле маркером — слова, своё имя, стрелки.
user_description.en: He writes on your body with marker — words, his name, arrows.

ai_description.ru: Ж позволяет М писать на её теле — знаки принадлежности, унижающие слова.
ai_description.en: F allows M to write on her body — marks of ownership, degrading words.

image_prompt: man writing with marker on woman's body, she lying on bed nude, intimate bedroom setting, artistic angle showing writing on skin
